name.description: The name of the route table. This is a unique identifier used within the resource group.

bgp_route_propagation_enabled.description: Whether to enable BGP route propagation.

route.description: A list of routes to be added to the route table.
route.type: list(object({ name: string, address_prefix: string, next_hop_type: string, next_hop_in_ip_address: optional(string) }))

timeouts.description: A set of timeouts for the route table.
timeouts.type: object({ create: optional(string), read: optional(string), update: optional(string), delete: optional(string) })

tags.description: A set of key-value pairs that are used to organize and categorize resources, often useful for cost management, automation, and identifying ownership.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
